pi_items.source: Manually inspected the actual project file loaded by the setup scripts (assets/sample_project.xml). The project loaded is "Commercial Construction", which does not contain a task named "Security Audit".
Confirmed from the task instructions ("Task ID 11"). While the loaded project is incorrect, UID 11 matches the prompt and the intended synthetic generator script.
Confirmed against the exact path explicitly requested in the task description and checked by verifier.py.
Extracted directly from the specific note text that the task prompt instructs the agent to enter.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructs the agent to add notes to the "Security Audit" task (Task ID 11) in the "Enterprise Software Development Project". However, due to a bug in the environment setup, a "Commercial Construction" sample project is loaded instead. In the loaded project, Task ID 11 is "Submit shop drawings and order long lead items - steel", and there is no task named "Security Audit". The target_task_name claim is contradicted by the actual environment data. The output_path, target_task_uid, and required_keywords are verified against the prompt instructions.
